name: Communauté Marocaine de Montréal (CMM)
description: The official hub for Moroccans in Montreal. Organizes cultural events, networking nights, Ramadan gatherings, and provides peer-to-peer immigration guidance.

name: Association Québec-Maroc (AQM)
description: Bridges Moroccan and Quebec professional communities. Hosts business mixers, educational workshops, and advocates for Moroccan immigrants in Quebec.

name: Morocco-Canada Business Forum
description: Professional network connecting Moroccan entrepreneurs and executives in Canada. Key for skilled workers and those launching startups.

name: Marocains de Montréal (Facebook Group)
description: Most active Moroccan community group in Montreal with 12,000+ members. The fastest way to get local advice — housing, halal food, job leads, community events.

name: YMCA Immigration Services Montreal
description: Government-funded settlement services for all newcomers. Offers free French/English classes, job placement, credential recognition assistance, and social integration programs.

name: Carrefour d'Aide aux Immigrants de Montréal (CAIM)
description: Nonprofit providing comprehensive settlement services. Specialized legal immigration advice, document translation, and government application support.

name: Centre d'Intégration Multi-Ethnique de Montréal
description: Multicultural integration center serving 40+ nationalities. Offers language training, job search workshops, cultural adaptation programs, and volunteer opportunities.

name: Technovation Maroc-Canada
description: Network for Moroccan tech professionals and students in Canada. Organizes hackathons, tech talks, startup showcases, and connects members with Canadian tech companies.

name: Arab World Montreal
description: Cultural hub for the Arab diaspora in Montreal. Arabic language classes, cultural events, Eid celebrations, and professional networking.

name: Muslim Community of Montreal (Mosquée Assalam)
description: Largest Muslim community center in Montreal. Provides halal resources, prayer facilities, Ramadan programs, marriage services, and social support networks.

name: Réseau pour l'Intégration des Immigrants et Immigrantes de Montréal (RIIM)
description: Network connecting immigrants with job opportunities, mentors, and employers in Montreal. Particularly strong for professionals in tech, finance, and engineering.

name: Startup and Tech Community Montreal (Notman House)
description: Montreal's premier startup ecosystem hub. Home to 100+ startups, weekly events, hackathons, and a network of tech employers actively recruiting international talent.
